response.original_title: The Oakwood College 1990 AYS Homecoming Concert
response.overview: A powerful, two‑hour live gospel celebration recorded at the Von Braun Civic Center in Huntsville, Alabama, the 1990 Oakwood College AYS Homecoming Concert brings together an extraordinary lineup of choirs, ensembles, soloists, and guest artists from the Oakwood College community. Hosted by comedian Jonathan Slocumb, the program blends high‑energy praise, heartfelt worship, and classic spirituals, capturing the vibrant musical culture that has defined Oakwood for generations.  The concert features standout performances from The Oakwood College Choir, The Aeolians, His Own, Divine Touch, Positive Images, Dynamic Praise, Revelation 14, and the OC Gospel Mass Choir, along with memorable solos by Angela Brown, Sharon Riley, Clifford Reynolds, and T. Marshall Kelly—joined in one selection by renowned arranger Mervyn E. Warren.
response.title: The Oakwood College 1990 AYS Homecoming Concert
